channel.title: ${2:post}s on The Old Codger
channel.description: Recent content in ${2:post}s on The Old Codger

item.title: My New Blog
item.description:
Welcome to my Blog.

I have decided to have another go at starting a blog. I’ll be using Emacs Org-Mode and Hugo, and hosting on Cloudflare Pages from a GitHub repo.

I’m looking to cover a wide range of topics from programming, web-dev, software that I use, to everyday things like politics and my personal insights as to what is happening in the world.

So we’ll get this first post out of the way, and then I’ll start blogging in earnest.
